global.description: The ad features a game interface with a prominent headline and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to level up and claim rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Game interface
elements.description: A grid layout showing four empty slots with circular placeholders, set against an orange background.

elements.label: Empty slot icon
elements.description: A circular placeholder icon, white with a brown dot in the center, indicating an empty game slot.

elements.label: Empty slot icon
elements.description: Another circular placeholder icon, similar to the previous one, indicating an empty game slot.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A rectangular area at the top with a light orange background, possibly for branding or decoration.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: Another rectangular area at the top, similar to the previous one, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Top right element
elements.description: A small rectangular area at the top right, possibly for additional branding or decorative purposes.

elements.label: Small top element
elements.description: A small rectangular area with a light color, positioned near the top, details unclear.

elements.label: Small top element
elements.description: Another small rectangular area, similar to the previous one, positioned near the top.

elements.label: Center small element
elements.description: A small rectangular area in the center, details unclear.

elements.label: Center small element
elements.description: Another small rectangular area in the center, similar to the previous one.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold, white text stating 'Level up today' over a darker orange background, conveying excitement.
elements.text_content: Level up today Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Game logo
elements.description: The logo 'NeonArena' in bold text, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Claim reward' in white, set against a darker orange background, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, game interface, rewards
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the game interface is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
